proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_enzalutamide have a different mean pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_abiraterone have a different mean pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_docetaxel have a different mean pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have a different mean pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_lu177_psma have a different mean pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have a different mean pfs_months than those who do not.

analyses.result_summary: treatment_enzalutamide main effect on PFS: mean PFS 3.728 (n=20076) vs 3.755 (n=29924); diff=-0.026 months, t-test p=0.153
treatment_abiraterone main effect on PFS: mean PFS 3.740 (n=14991) vs 3.746 (n=35009); diff=-0.006 months, t-test p=0.776
treatment_docetaxel main effect on PFS: mean PFS 3.732 (n=15187) vs 3.749 (n=34813); diff=-0.017 months, t-test p=0.381
treatment_olaparib main effect on PFS: mean PFS 3.829 (n=5098) vs 3.735 (n=44902); diff=+0.094 months, t-test p=0.00329
treatment_lu177_psma main effect on PFS: mean PFS 3.741 (n=7504) vs 3.745 (n=42496); diff=-0.004 months, t-test p=0.872
treatment_pembrolizumab main effect on PFS: mean PFS 3.805 (n=2384) vs 3.741 (n=47616); diff=+0.064 months, t-test p=0.137

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with mcrpc=1 have lower mean pfs_months than mcrpc=0 patients (negative effect).
Patients with visceral_mets=1 have lower mean pfs_months than visceral_mets=0 patients (negative effect).
Patients with bone_mets=1 have lower mean pfs_months than bone_mets=0 patients (negative effect).
Patients with liver_mets=1 have lower mean pfs_months than liver_mets=0 patients (negative effect).
Patients with adrenal_mets=1 have lower mean pfs_months than adrenal_mets=0 patients (negative effect).

analyses.result_summary: mcrpc: mean PFS 3.509 (n=27481) vs 4.031 (n=22519); diff=-0.521 months, t-test p=1.58e-181
visceral_mets: mean PFS 3.706 (n=9973) vs 3.754 (n=40027); diff=-0.048 months, t-test p=0.0345
bone_mets: mean PFS 3.753 (n=10056) vs 3.742 (n=39944); diff=+0.011 months, t-test p=0.624
liver_mets: mean PFS 3.743 (n=7392) vs 3.744 (n=42608); diff=-0.002 months, t-test p=0.948
adrenal_mets: mean PFS 3.782 (n=4994) vs 3.740 (n=45006); diff=+0.042 months, t-test p=0.166

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Older age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher gleason_score is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher psa_ng_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: ecog_ps: OLS coef = -1.1606 per unit, p=0 (n=50000, R^2=0.1509)
age_years: OLS coef = +0.1740 per unit, p=0 (n=50000, R^2=0.7319)
gleason_score: OLS coef = -0.0062 per unit, p=0.486 (n=50000, R^2=0.0000)

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: albumin_g_dl: OLS coef = +0.4949 per unit, p=1.47e-166 (n=50000, R^2=0.0150)
hemoglobin_g_dl: OLS coef = -0.0115 per unit, p=0.0225 (n=50000, R^2=0.0001)
alkaline_phosphatase_u_l: OLS coef = -0.0005 per unit, p=0.00663 (n=50000, R^2=0.0001)

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher nlr is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher calcium_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope, hypercalcemia of malignancy).

analyses.result_summary: weight_loss_pct_6mo: OLS coef = -0.0749 per unit, p=9.91e-226 (n=50000, R^2=0.0204)
calcium_mg_dl: OLS coef = -0.0280 per unit, p=0.121 (n=50000, R^2=0.0000)

proposed_hypotheses.text: brca2_mutation=1 is associated with different mean pfs_months than brca2_mutation=0 (overall, ignoring treatment).
ar_v7_positive=1 is associated with shorter mean pfs_months than ar_v7_positive=0.
msi_high=1 is associated with different mean pfs_months than msi_high=0.
psma_high=1 is associated with different mean pfs_months than psma_high=0.

analyses.result_summary: brca2_mutation main: mean PFS 3.835 (n=4996) vs 3.734 (n=45004); diff=+0.100 months, t-test p=0.00205
ar_v7_positive main: mean PFS 3.734 (n=10038) vs 3.747 (n=39962); diff=-0.013 months, t-test p=0.58
msi_high main: mean PFS 3.778 (n=1528) vs 3.743 (n=48472); diff=+0.035 months, t-test p=0.515
psma_high main: mean PFS 3.752 (n=29962) vs 3.732 (n=20038); diff=+0.020 months, t-test p=0.273

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive treatment_olaparib x brca2_mutation interaction on pfs_months: BRCA2-mutated patients gain more PFS from olaparib than BRCA2-wildtype patients.

analyses.result_summary: olaparib x brca2: interaction coef = +1.6188, p=4.33e-61. Means brca2_mutation=0/treatment_olaparib=0:3.742, brca2_mutation=0/treatment_olaparib=1:3.668, brca2_mutation=1/treatment_olaparib=0:3.671, brca2_mutation=1/treatment_olaparib=1:5.216

analyses.code: stratified t-test of olaparib effect within brca2_mutation==1
analyses.result_summary: Within brca2_mutation==1 (n=4996): olaparib PFS diff = +1.545 months, p=3.95e-27

analyses.code: stratified t-test of olaparib effect within brca2_mutation==0
analyses.result_summary: Within brca2_mutation==0 (n=45004): olaparib PFS diff = -0.073 months, p=0.0191

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive treatment_pembrolizumab x msi_high interaction on pfs_months: MSI-high patients gain more PFS from pembrolizumab than MSS patients.

analyses.result_summary: pembrolizumab x msi_high: interaction coef = -0.3401, p=0.153. Means msi_high=0/treatment_pembrolizumab=0:3.739, msi_high=0/treatment_pembrolizumab=1:3.814, msi_high=1/treatment_pembrolizumab=0:3.792, msi_high=1/treatment_pembrolizumab=1:3.527

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive treatment_lu177_psma x psma_high interaction on pfs_months: PSMA-high patients gain more PFS from Lu-177 PSMA therapy than PSMA-low patients.

analyses.result_summary: lu177_psma x psma_high: interaction coef = -0.0174, p=0.737. Means psma_high=0/treatment_lu177_psma=0:3.731, psma_high=0/treatment_lu177_psma=1:3.737, psma_high=1/treatment_lu177_psma=0:3.754, psma_high=1/treatment_lu177_psma=1:3.743

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a negative treatment_enzalutamide x ar_v7_positive interaction on pfs_months: AR-V7-positive patients gain less PFS from enzalutamide than AR-V7-negative patients.

analyses.result_summary: enzalutamide x ar_v7_positive: interaction coef = +0.0025, p=0.957. Means ar_v7_positive=0/treatment_enzalutamide=0:3.757, ar_v7_positive=0/treatment_enzalutamide=1:3.731, ar_v7_positive=1/treatment_enzalutamide=0:3.744, ar_v7_positive=1/treatment_enzalutamide=1:3.719

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a negative treatment_abiraterone x ar_v7_positive interaction on pfs_months: AR-V7-positive patients gain less PFS from abiraterone than AR-V7-negative patients.

analyses.result_summary: abiraterone x ar_v7_positive: interaction coef = +0.0476, p=0.334. Means ar_v7_positive=0/treatment_abiraterone=0:3.751, ar_v7_positive=0/treatment_abiraterone=1:3.736, ar_v7_positive=1/treatment_abiraterone=0:3.724, ar_v7_positive=1/treatment_abiraterone=1:3.757

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive treatment_docetaxel x visceral_mets interaction on pfs_months: visceral-mets patients gain more PFS from docetaxel than non-visceral patients.

analyses.result_summary: docetaxel x visceral_mets: interaction coef = +0.0516, p=0.294. Means visceral_mets=0/treatment_docetaxel=0:3.762, visceral_mets=0/treatment_docetaxel=1:3.735, visceral_mets=1/treatment_docetaxel=0:3.699, visceral_mets=1/treatment_docetaxel=1:3.723

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs across race_ethnicity categories (white/black/hispanic/asian/other).
Mean pfs_months differs across insurance_type categories (medicare/private/medicaid/uninsured).
rural_residence=1 is associated with different mean pfs_months than rural_residence=0.
Higher education_years is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).

proposed_hypotheses.text: snp_rs4986893=1 is associated with different mean pfs_months than snp_rs4986893=0 (top hit from SNP screen).
snp_rs429358=1 is associated with different mean pfs_months than snp_rs429358=0 (top hit from SNP screen).
snp_rs1065852=1 is associated with different mean pfs_months than snp_rs1065852=0 (top hit from SNP screen).
snp_rs1799983=1 is associated with different mean pfs_months than snp_rs1799983=0 (top hit from SNP screen).

analyses.result_summary: snp_rs4986893 mean PFS diff = -0.092 months, p=0.0148 (rank 1 from screen of 25 SNPs)
snp_rs429358 mean PFS diff = +0.047 months, p=0.0655 (rank 2 from screen of 25 SNPs)
snp_rs1065852 mean PFS diff = -0.048 months, p=0.0937 (rank 3 from screen of 25 SNPs)
snp_rs1799983 mean PFS diff = -0.030 months, p=0.117 (rank 4 from screen of 25 SNPs)
Across 25 SNPs, 1 reached nominal p<0.05; expected by chance ~1.2, suggesting no strong SNP–PFS signal.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is an ecog_ps x treatment_docetaxel interaction on pfs_months (poor PS modulates docetaxel benefit).
There is an ecog_ps x treatment_lu177_psma interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: ecog_ps x docetaxel: interaction coef = +0.0116, p=0.663. Means treatment_docetaxel=0/ecog_ps=0:4.690, treatment_docetaxel=0/ecog_ps=1:3.496, treatment_docetaxel=1/ecog_ps=0:4.661, treatment_docetaxel=1/ecog_ps=1:3.482

ecog_ps x lu177_psma: interaction coef = +0.0246, p=0.472. Means treatment_lu177_psma=0/ecog_ps=0:4.684, treatment_lu177_psma=0/ecog_ps=1:3.489, treatment_lu177_psma=1/ecog_ps=0:4.662, treatment_lu177_psma=1/ecog_ps=1:3.507

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ecog_ps, age_years, mcrpc, visceral_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, hemoglobin_g_dl, alkaline_phosphatase_u_l, psa_ng_ml, and prior_lines_of_therapy, treatment_olaparib has a non-zero effect on pfs_months.
After the same adjustment, treatment_lu177_psma has a non-zero effect on pfs_months.
After the same adjustment, treatment_docetaxel has a non-zero effect on pfs_months.
After the same adjustment, mcrpc still independently shortens pfs_months (negative coefficient).

analyses.result_summary: olaparib adjusted: adjusted coef=+0.1384, p=2.26e-64 (covariates=['ecog_ps', 'age_years', 'mcrpc', 'visceral_mets', 'albumin_g_dl', 'ldh_u_l', 'hemoglobin_g_dl', 'alkaline_phosphatase_u_l', 'psa_ng_ml', 'prior_lines_of_therapy'])

lu177_psma adjusted: adjusted coef=-0.0087, p=0.207 (covariates=['ecog_ps', 'age_years', 'mcrpc', 'visceral_mets', 'albumin_g_dl', 'ldh_u_l', 'hemoglobin_g_dl', 'alkaline_phosphatase_u_l', 'psa_ng_ml', 'prior_lines_of_therapy'])

docetaxel adjusted: adjusted coef=-0.0056, p=0.3 (covariates=['ecog_ps', 'age_years', 'mcrpc', 'visceral_mets', 'albumin_g_dl', 'ldh_u_l', 'hemoglobin_g_dl', 'alkaline_phosphatase_u_l', 'psa_ng_ml', 'prior_lines_of_therapy'])

mcrpc adjusted: adjusted coef=-0.3711, p=0 (covariates=['ecog_ps', 'age_years', 'visceral_mets', 'albumin_g_dl', 'ldh_u_l', 'hemoglobin_g_dl', 'alkaline_phosphatase_u_l', 'psa_ng_ml', 'prior_lines_of_therapy'])

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the mcrpc=1 subgroup, the positive treatment_olaparib x brca2_mutation interaction on pfs_months persists.
Within the mcrpc=0 subgroup, the treatment_olaparib x brca2_mutation interaction on pfs_months is also present.

analyses.result_summary: mcrpc==1: olaparib x brca2 (n=27481): interaction coef=+1.6300, p=6.02e-36
mcrpc==0: olaparib x brca2 (n=22519): interaction coef=+1.6267, p=1.33e-28

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher poor_prog_index (composite of high LDH, low albumin, weight loss >5%, ECOG>=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Within the high-risk subgroup (poor_prog_index>=3), individual treatments are not associated with longer pfs_months (treatment effects attenuate in adverse phenotype).

analyses.result_summary: poor_prog_index: OLS coef = -0.5756 per unit, p=0 (n=50000, R^2=0.0768)
poor_prog_index>=3 (n=14264): treatment_enzalutamide diff = -0.024, p=0.466
poor_prog_index>=3 (n=14264): treatment_abiraterone diff = +0.002, p=0.962
poor_prog_index>=3 (n=14264): treatment_docetaxel diff = -0.047, p=0.175
poor_prog_index>=3 (n=14264): treatment_olaparib diff = +0.137, p=0.0134
poor_prog_index>=3 (n=14264): treatment_lu177_psma diff = +0.046, p=0.296

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ecog_ps, mcrpc, visceral_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, age_years, race_ethnicity remains associated with pfs_months (joint F-test p<0.05).
After the same adjustment, insurance_type remains associated with pfs_months (joint F-test p<0.05).
After the same adjustment, rural_residence remains associated with pfs_months.

analyses.code: pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + age_years + C(race_ethnicity); F-test of race_ethnicity dummies
analyses.result_summary: race_ethnicity adjusted F=0.510, p=0.729; coefs black=-0.013, hispanic=-0.011, other=+0.011, white=-0.008

analyses.code: pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + age_years + C(insurance_type); F-test of insurance_type dummies
analyses.result_summary: insurance_type adjusted F=1.018, p=0.383; coefs medicare=+0.012, private=+0.006, uninsured=+0.019

analyses.code: pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + age_years + rural_residence
analyses.result_summary: rural_residence adjusted: adjusted coef=-0.0116, p=0.0861 (covariates=['ecog_ps', 'mcrpc', 'visceral_mets', 'albumin_g_dl', 'ldh_u_l', 'age_years'])

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a negative ldh_u_l x visceral_mets interaction on pfs_months: the adverse slope of LDH is steeper in patients with visceral_mets.
There is a negative weight_loss_pct_6mo x mcrpc interaction on pfs_months: weight loss is more harmful within mCRPC.

analyses.result_summary: ldh x visceral_mets: interaction coef = +0.0000, p=0.91. Means visceral_mets=0/ldh_u_l=0:nan, visceral_mets=0/ldh_u_l=1:nan, visceral_mets=1/ldh_u_l=0:nan, visceral_mets=1/ldh_u_l=1:nan

weight_loss x mcrpc: interaction coef = +0.0026, p=0.567. Means mcrpc=0/weight_loss_pct_6mo=0:4.330, mcrpc=0/weight_loss_pct_6mo=1:4.638, mcrpc=1/weight_loss_pct_6mo=0:3.789, mcrpc=1/weight_loss_pct_6mo=1:3.809

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a comprehensive multivariable OLS model including treatments, biomarkers, disease state, labs, and demographics, the treatment_olaparib x brca2_mutation interaction term has a positive coefficient (BRCA2-mutated patients gain more PFS from olaparib).
In the same comprehensive model, ecog_ps remains negatively associated with pfs_months.
In the same comprehensive model, age_years remains associated with pfs_months (non-zero coefficient).

analyses.code: pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + age_years + mcrpc + visceral_mets + bone_mets + liver_mets + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + alkaline_phosphatase_u_l + crp_mg_l + nlr + weight_loss_pct_6mo + calcium_mg_dl + psa_ng_ml + gleason_score + pain_nrs + fatigue_grade + prior_lines_of_therapy + treatment_enzalutamide + treatment_abiraterone + treatment_docetaxel + treatment_lu177_psma + treatment_pembrolizumab + treatment_olaparib*brca2_mutation + ar_v7_positive + msi_high + psma_high + tp53_mutation + pten_loss + heart_failure + chronic_kidney_disease + C(race_ethnicity) + C(insurance_type) + rural_residence
analyses.result_summary: Comprehensive model: olaparib x brca2 interaction coef = +1.4365, p=0 (R^2=0.9519, n=50000)

analyses.result_summary: Comprehensive model: ecog_ps coef = -1.1516, p=0
